title: T3 Ingestion: Promotion mechanics proof
prompt: Prove the canonical library's versioning semantics with ONE real promote+demote cycle on the first ratified artifact (expected: canonical/skills/review-dimensional/ from T3-01/T3-02 — recon locates any ratified artifact; zero ratified = abort to needs-decision). Build a minimal evidence-backed challenger at variants/self.v2.md (delta sourced from T3-02's REPORT.md Findings or a documented set_aside[] recoverable from _source/ — never new harvesting), write a promotion pack at backlog/wargames/proof/T3-26/PLAN.md (diff, v1 sha256, swap plan, proposed version_history event schema, proposed doc changes), then PAUSE for David via engine/store/needs-decision/wg-t3-26-promotion-mechanics-proof.json -> engine/store/decisions/ — the pause is DESIGNED, not a failure: no decision this run means park and stop; a post-decision re-dispatch resumes via the war game's re-entry router. On approve: demote the old canonical to variants/was-canonical-<date>.md (byte-identical, hash-verified), promote the challenger to SKILL.md, bump provenance to version 2 with a version_history promotion event (rewrite_status stays ratified), update canonical/INDEX.md (still 1 ratified artifact — a version bump is not a new artifact), and codify the mechanics in docs/promotion-procedure.md plus one appended pointer line in docs/canonical-form-spec.md section 'Versioning a ratified artifact'. On decline: no swap, challenger stays in variants/ as a bench variant, no procedure doc. Either way write backlog/wargames/proof/T3-26/REPORT.md and commit. NEVER write the decision file yourself or infer approval from silence; never touch research/, _source/, docs/architecture.md, engine code, or ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins/. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-26-promotion-mechanics-proof.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: Promoted path: the promoted artifact's provenance.json reads version 2, rewrite_status 'ratified', len(version_history)==1 with a 'promotion' event carrying version/date/event/promoted/demoted/change/decided_by keys; exactly one variants/was-canonical-<date>.md exists and its sha256 is recorded in backlog/wargames/proof/T3-26/REPORT.md matching the pre-swap SKILL.md hash (byte-identical demotion); every origins[].verbatim_copy still exists and _source/ is untouched by the wg-t3-26 commit; docs/promotion-procedure.md exists and greps for 'was-canonical'; docs/canonical-form-spec.md greps exactly once for 'promotion-procedure' (append-only pointer, or a recorded skip in the report); canonical/INDEX.md still shows 'Total artifacts ratified: 1'; PLAN.md and REPORT.md exist under backlog/wargames/proof/T3-26/; engine/store/decisions/wg-t3-26-promotion-mechanics-proof.json exists (David really decided); engine/store/results/wg-t3-26-promotion-mechanics-proof.json exists; a wg-t3-26 commit is in git log. Declined path: version still 1 with empty version_history, no was-canonical file, variants/self.v2.md still on disk (declined challenger stays on the bench), no docs/promotion-procedure.md, INDEX.md unchanged, REPORT.md outcome DECLINED quoting David verbatim; decision/results/commit checks unchanged. Any path: git status of research/ untouched, no $ART/SKILL.md.v1 file created, ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins untouched. A run that ends parked (needs-decision file present, no decision yet, ticket in running/) is a valid intermediate state, not a failure.
